conservative.name: Venomous Web
conservative.check: Ballistic Skill (Ag) vs Highest Target Defence
conservative.requirements: Equipped with a flinger, target engagement within medium range

success.description: The targets are struck by a venomous ball of webs. Each target suffers -2 damage and gains the Entangled condition until freed. A character can free himself (or an ally can free him) with an Average (2d) Athletics or Coordination check as an action. This check gains " Draw 1 critical wound and suffers fatigue equal to its severity. Then return the critical to the deck"

bane.description: Add 2 recharge tokens to this card as the goblin riders squabble

chaosStar.description: 1 goblin rider gets stuck and is flung with the web. He gains the Entangled condition and becomes engaged with the target engagement

challenge.description: Special: You may attack a target at long range by adding to the dice pool. For each goblin rider, add to the dice pool
